title: 8 Signs Your Brothers in Christ Actually Have Your Back
caption:
Most men have guys in their life. Fewer have brothers.

The difference isn't how often you see each other. It's whether they know your actual sin, not just your prayer requests. Whether they'd call — not just reply. Whether they'd tell you when you're drifting, before you hit the wall.

8 signs your brothers in Christ actually have your back:

1. They know your actual sin.
2. They call. They don't just reply to your posts.
3. They tell you when you're wrong — before everyone else does.
4. They've seen you at your worst and didn't move.
5. They pray for you by name.
6. They hold you to what you said.
7. They'd get in a car at midnight.
8. They talk about God like it's natural — not just at Bible study.

If you have one man who does most of these, you're ahead of most men your age.

Tag him.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #godlymen #manofgod #accountability #discipleship #scripture
